chunks.text: H C J D A 38. JUDGMENT SHEET IN THE LAHORE HIGH COURT LAHORE (JUDICIAL DEPARTMENT) Crl. Revision No.129020 of 2018 Nabeel Ahmad Versus The State etc. Date of hearing: 11.02.2019. Petitioner by: Mr. Farrukh Gulzar Awan, Advocate. Respondents No.2 by: Mian Muhammad Umer Shahzad, Advocate. State by: Mr. Tariq Javed, District Public Prosecutor. Muhammad Waheed Khan, J.- For reasons recorded in my judgment of even date passed in connected Crl. Revision No.205741 of 2018 (Muhammad Ameen etc versus The State etc), this criminal revision is dismissed as having been withdrawn. So, learned trial court is directed to proceed in the private compliant filed by respondent No.2/Ghulam Sabir against the other accused in accordance with law. (Muhammad Waheed Khan) Judge. Ansar*
